pwa.tagline: Ku rakib app-ka si aad ugu dhakhso ugu gasho shaashadda guriga.
pwa.desktopHint: Chrome ama Edge: calaamadda rakibaadda barka cinwaanka, ama menu (⋮) → Install app.
pwa.iosHint: iPhone / iPad: Share → Add to Home Screen.
pwa.androidHint: Android: menu (⋮) → Install app ama Add to Home screen.

hero.subtitle: KULMISCART waa hab fudud oo aad ku furto dukaanka internetka, wadaagto xiriirkaaga, oo si degdeg ah u hesho dalabyada.

home.checkoutImageAlt: Iibsade iyo iibiye agagaarka lacag bixinta: lacag bixinta mobilka, ganacsiga diyaar u ah WhatsApp
home.checkoutTitle: Lama baahna lacag bixinta adag. La xiriir iibiyayaasha toos.
home.checkoutB2: Socodka dalabka WhatsApp waa dhakhso badan
home.aiStep1: Soo rar sawir cad oo alaabtaada ah
home.aiStep2: AI wuxuu qorayaa cinwaanka, qaybta, iyo sharaxaadda
home.aiStep3: Ku dar dukaankaaga oo wadaag xiriirkaaga
home.aiImageAlt: Iibiye miisas leh laptop, kamarad, iyo mobil — ganacsiga yaryar iyo liiska internetka
home.aiDesc: Soo rar sawirka alaabta oo ha AI ku qoro cinwaanka, qaybta, iyo sharaxaadda daqiiqado gudahood.

testimonials.title: Waxaa jecel ganacsatada & iibsadayaasha
testimonials.subtitle: Jawaab celin dhab ah oo ka timid dadka isticmaala KULMISCART.

topStores.title: Dukaamada ugu sarreeya
topStores.subtitle: Ganacsato la hubo oo leh dukaamyo diyaar u ah WhatsApp.

roadmap.title: Daqiiqado gudahood furitaan
roadmap.subtitle: Raac wadada isdiiwaangelinta ilaa dalabka WhatsApp ugu horreeya — adigoon lacag bixin adag.

overview.title: Nuqulka
overview.subtitle: Soo dhawoow — waa halkan xaaladda dukaankaaga.

products.title: Alaabta
products.freeLimit: Free: illaa 20 alaab iyo 10 fiidyo. Pro: AI + xad dheeraad.
products.aiHint: Soo rar sawir. AI wuxuu soo saaraa magac, sharaxaad, astaamo.
products.aiFreeHint: AI waa Pro. Ka kor Subscription.

fields.name: Magaca alaabta
fields.videoHint: Ikhtiyaari: hal fiidyo gaaban (~1 daqiiqo ama ka yar). MP4 ama WebM waa ugu fiican; ugu badnaan 45 MB. Ilaa 4 sawir kor.
fields.legacyVideoNote: Alaabtan wali waxay isticmaashaa link la geliyey ka hor soo dejinta faylka. Ka saar ama hay; fiidyo cusub ayaa beddeli doona markaad doorato fayl.
fields.imagesHint: 1 illaa 4 sawir (ugu yaraan hal). Sawirkii ugu horreeyay waa kan kaarka.

errors.invalidVideo: Fiidyowu ma saxna ama waa weyn yahay. Soo rar fayl taageeraya ama isticmaal link hore.
errors.videoInvalidType: Dooro fayl fiidyo ah (MP4, WebM, MOV, iwm).
errors.videoTooLarge: Faylku waa weyn yahay (ugu badnaan 45 MB).
errors.videoTooLong: Fiidyowu waa inuu ahaadaa 60 ilbiriqsi ama ka yar.
errors.videoUnreadable: Lama akhrin karo fiidyahan. Isku day fayl kale ama MP4.
errors.imagesMin: Ugu yaraan hal sawir ku dar.

products.uploadVideoSub: Hal fayl oo keliya — dhererka la hubiyaa ka hor intaadan kaydin.

orders.title: Dalabyada
orders.subtitle: WhatsApp isticmaal si aad ula xiriirto iibsadayaasha.
orders.noSearchResults: Ma jiro dalab ku habboon raadinta.

messages.title: Farriimaha
messages.preview: WhatsApp u fur si aad ugu jawaabto.
messages.body: Macaamiisha WhatsApp kaga soo gala dukaankaaga.

settings.title: Dejinta dukaanka
settings.logoHint: PNG ama JPG oo laba jibbaaran ayaa fiican.
settings.bannerHint: Sawir ballaaran madaxa dukaanka (JPG ama PNG).
